TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Laniahu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).

S.FORM: laupakadau hai nasadu mas.
S.PHON: l~ɬaupakadau x~χai nasadu mas.
S.FORM: laupakadau hai nasadu mas.
S.PHON: l~ɬaupakadau x~χai nasadu mas.
S.TRANSL: 現在看得到
Now we can see

S.FORM: avandii tu ai.
S.PHON: avandii tu ai.
S.FORM: avandii tu ai.
S.PHON: avandii tu ai.
S.TRANSL: 那個,嗯
that uhm

S.FORM: andii tu patasantan.
S.PHON: andii tu patasantan.
S.FORM: andii tu patasantan.
S.PHON: andii tu patasantan.
S.TRANSL: 那本書
that book

S.FORM: sadu tu tasa uvaaz at aiza maza asu.
S.PHON: sadu tu tasa uvaað at aiða maða asu.
S.FORM: sadu tu tasa uvaaz at aiza maza asu.
S.PHON: sadu tu tasa uvaað at aiða maða asu.
S.TRANSL: 看得見一個孩子,就有那隻狗.
We can see one child, then there is that dog.

S.FORM: at aupa aiza maza ai maza sisiuh ingadah sia pan.
S.PHON: at aupa aiða maða ai maða ɕiɕiux~χ iŋadax~χ ɕia pan.
S.FORM: at aupa aiza maza ai maza sisiuh ingadah sia pan.
S.PHON: at aupa aiða maða ai maða ɕiɕiux~χ iŋadax~χ ɕia pan.
S.TRANSL: 就因為有那個青蛙在瓶子裡面.
Then because there is that frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: at aupa ai mazadii siul a aiza maza buan.
S.PHON: at aupa ai maðadii ɕiul~ɬ a aiða maða buan.
S.FORM: at aupa ai mazadii siul a aiza maza buan.
S.PHON: at aupa ai maðadii ɕiul~ɬ a aiða maða buan.
S.TRANSL: 就,因為那隻青蛙有月亮.
Then, because that frog there, there is moonlight.

S.FORM: suoyi mahtu kata haiap tu maza naian hai ai.
S.PHON: su**i max~χtu kata x~χaiap tu maða naian x~χai ai.
S.FORM: suoyi mahtu kata haiap tu maza naian hai ai.
S.PHON: su**i max~χtu kata x~χaiap tu maða naian x~χai ai.
S.TRANSL: 嗯
Uhm

S.FORM: isian mas labian tu cikan.
S.PHON: iɕian mas l~ɬabian tu ʨikan.
S.FORM: isian mas labian tu cikan.
S.PHON: iɕian mas l~ɬabian tu ʨikan.
S.TRANSL: 所以,我們可以知道他們在晚上.
So, we can know they are at night.

S.FORM: mmm at aupa ai ai labian aupa hai.
S.PHON: mmm at aupa ai ai l~ɬabian aupa x~χai.
S.FORM: mmm at aupa ai ai labian aupa hai.
S.PHON: mmm at aupa ai ai l~ɬabian aupa x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 嗯,嗯,因為深夜.
Uhm, uhm because it's night.

S.FORM: at aupa maza asu mas uvaaz cia asabahin naia sia sapalan.
S.PHON: at aupa maða asu mas uvaað ʨia asabax~χin naia ɕia sapal~ɬan.
S.FORM: at aupa maza asu mas uvaaz cia asabahin naia sia sapalan.
S.PHON: at aupa maða asu mas uvaað ʨia asabax~χin naia ɕia sapal~ɬan.
S.TRANSL: 就,因為那隻狗和孩子在床睡著了.
Then, because that dog and child went to sleep in the bed.

S.FORM: maza dii sisiuha ka macisbai munapav sia pancia.
S.PHON: maða dii ɕiɕiux~χa ka maʨisbai munapav ɕia panʨia.
S.FORM: maza dii sisiuha ka macisbai munapav sia pancia.
S.PHON: maða dii ɕiɕiux~χa ka maʨisbai munapav ɕia panʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那個青蛙就跑掉出瓶子來.
That frog then ran away out of the bottle.

S.FORM: ungat aupa nii tu haiapun tu masikua.
S.PHON: uŋat aupa nii tu x~χaiapun tu maɕikua.
S.FORM: ungat aupa nii tu haiapun tu masikua.
S.PHON: uŋat aupa nii tu x~χaiapun tu maɕikua.
S.TRANSL: 就因為他不知道往哪裡.
Then because he doesn't know where to.

S.FORM: at aupa ai at cinmakavin uvaaza mas asu hai.
S.PHON: at aupa ai at ʨinmakavin uvaaða mas asu x~χai.
S.FORM: at aupa ai at cinmakavin uvaaza mas asu hai.
S.PHON: at aupa ai at ʨinmakavin uvaaða mas asu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 孩子跟狗突然醒來.
The child and the dog suddenly wake up.

S.FORM: naia hai masivit mas pan tu at.
S.PHON: naia x~χai maɕivit mas pan tu at.
S.FORM: naia hai masivit mas pan tu at.
S.PHON: naia x~χai maɕivit mas pan tu at.
S.TRANSL: 他們覺察瓶子
They inspect the bottle

S.FORM: via tu ka ukin adii sisiuha.
S.PHON: via tu ka ukin adii ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: via tu ka ukin adii sisiuha.
S.PHON: via tu ka ukin adii ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼青蛙不在那裡了?
Why is the frog no longer there?

S.FORM: ai hai nii kata haiap tu mazadii sisiuha hai masikua.
S.PHON: ai x~χai nii kata x~χaiap tu maðadii ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai maɕikua.
S.FORM: ai hai nii kata haiap tu mazadii sisiuha hai masikua.
S.PHON: ai x~χai nii kata x~χaiap tu maðadii ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai maɕikua.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒辦法知道那個青蛙往哪走了.
We can't know where that frog went to.

S.FORM: pahasia na kilimunta.
S.PHON: pax~χaɕia na kil~ɬimunta.
S.FORM: pahasia na kilimunta.
S.PHON: pax~χaɕia na kil~ɬimunta.
S.TRANSL: 所以,我們會找牠.
So we will look for him.

S.FORM: ai at kuisadii sisiuha ungat.
S.PHON: ai at kuisadii ɕiɕiux~χa uŋat.
S.FORM: ai at kuisadii sisiuha ungat.
S.PHON: ai at kuisadii ɕiɕiux~χa uŋat.
S.TRANSL: 就,青蛙就去哪裡?
Then, were did that frog go to?

S.FORM: amin adii tu amin adii.
S.PHON: amin adii tu amin adii.
S.FORM: amin adii tu amin adii.
S.PHON: amin adii tu amin adii.
S.TRANSL: 他們全部,他們全部.
All of them, all of them.

S.FORM: maza adii.
S.PHON: maða adii.
S.FORM: maza adii.
S.PHON: maða adii.
S.TRANSL: 那個那邊.
That one over there.

S.FORM: uvaaz mas asu hai maupacia amin naia tu kaivakaiva naia tu at.
S.PHON: uvaað mas asu x~χai maupaʨia amin naia tu kaivakaiva naia tu at.
S.FORM: uvaaz mas asu hai maupacia amin naia tu kaivakaiva naia tu at.
S.PHON: uvaað mas asu x~χai maupaʨia amin naia tu kaivakaiva naia tu at.
S.TRANSL: 小朋與與狗,他們都緊張.
The child and the dog,all of them were nervous.

S.FORM: usabi(n ma)s sisiuh ai.
S.PHON: usabi(n ma)s ɕiɕiux~χ ai.
S.FORM: usabi(n ma)s sisiuh ai.
S.PHON: usabi(n ma)s ɕiɕiux~χ ai.
S.TRANSL: usa 'where' usually is 'isa'
Where did the frog go

S.FORM: maza sisiuha ingadah sia pan hai ka uka at.
S.PHON: maða ɕiɕiux~χa iŋadax~χ ɕia pan x~χai ka uka at.
S.FORM: maza sisiuha ingadah sia pan hai ka uka at.
S.PHON: maða ɕiɕiux~χa iŋadax~χ ɕia pan x~χai ka uka at.
S.TRANSL: 那個在瓶子裡面的青蛙,但牠不在.
That frog inside the bottle, but it's not there.

S.FORM: amina kucu ka tunbakun amin sadu tu ka kungadah sia kucutan at.
S.PHON: amina kuʨu ka tunbakun amin sadu tu ka kuŋadax~χ ɕia kuʨutan at.
S.FORM: amina kucu ka tunbakun amin sadu tu ka kungadah sia kucutan at.
S.PHON: amina kuʨu ka tunbakun amin sadu tu ka kuŋadax~χ ɕia kuʨutan at.
S.TRANSL: 所有的鞋子被打開,被檢查,看見他們是否進去鞋子裡面.
All of the shoes were opened and inspected to see if he went into the shoes.

S.FORM: mazadii a asu hai.
S.PHON: maðadii a asu x~χai.
S.FORM: mazadii a asu hai.
S.PHON: maðadii a asu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗,
That dog over there,

S.FORM: saia ai kungadah bungu sia.
S.PHON: saia ai kuŋadax~χ buŋu ɕia.
S.FORM: saia ai kungadah bungu sia.
S.PHON: saia ai kuŋadax~χ buŋu ɕia.
S.TRANSL: 牠把頭進去.
He puts in its head.

S.FORM: avadii tu ai dangia(n ma)s sisiuh tu pancia s adu adu.
S.PHON: avadii tu ai daŋia(n ma)s ɕiɕiux~χ tu panʨia s adu adu.

In there, to see if the bottle where they put the frog.

S.FORM: at uka ai.
S.PHON: at uka ai.
S.FORM: at uka ai.
S.PHON: at uka ai.
S.TRANSL: 但牠不在.
But it's not there.

S.FORM: ka ungadahtan hai ka uka.
S.PHON: ka uŋadax~χtan x~χai ka uka.
S.FORM: ka ungadahtan hai ka uka.
S.PHON: ka uŋadax~χtan x~χai ka uka.

If it went inside of it, but it's not there.

S.FORM: at aupa.
S.PHON: at aupa.
S.FORM: at aupa.
S.PHON: at aupa.
S.TRANSL: 因為
because

S.FORM: ka ai maupacia naia tu nii tu inkaduan.

S.FORM: ka ai maupacia naia tu nii tu inkaduan.

This way they won't find it.

S.FORM: mazadii asu hai.
S.PHON: maðadii asu x~χai.
S.FORM: mazadii asu hai.
S.PHON: maðadii asu x~χai.

that dog

S.FORM: kaz ai ai at.

S.FORM: kaz ai ai at.

S.TRANSL: 就
Then

S.FORM: asu mas uvaazcia hai ka 嗯 nii ai.
S.PHON: asu mas uvaaðʨia x~χai ka * nii ai.
S.FORM: asu mas uvaazcia hai ka 嗯 nii ai.
S.PHON: asu mas uvaaðʨia x~χai ka * nii ai.
S.TRANSL: 狗和孩子找不到[青蛙].
The dog and the child can't [find the frog].

S.FORM: tankakutun tankakutunin tu tu.
S.PHON: tankakutun tankakutunin tu tu.
S.FORM: tankakutun tankakutunin tu tu.
S.PHON: tankakutun tankakutunin tu tu.
S.TRANSL: 已經到了第二天的凌晨.
It was already the morning of the next day.

S.FORM: um'umin.
S.PHON: umʔumin.
S.FORM: um'umin.
S.PHON: umʔumin.
S.TRANSL: 已經早上了.
It became already morning

S.FORM: tu ai maza minkailasin hai.

S.FORM: tu ai maza minkailasin hai.
S.PHON: tu ai maða minkail~ɬaɕin x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他已經睡醒了.
He woke up.

S.FORM: ai nii naia islunghu kilim.

S.PHON: ai nii naia isl~ɬuŋx~χu kil~ɬim.
S.TRANSL: 他們不停的找.
They didn't take a break from searching.

S.FORM: mazadii asu hai maldauk tu maza mazadii bungua ka pingadahun sia pancia.
S.PHON: maðadii asu x~χai mal~ɬdauk tu maða maðadii buŋua ka piŋadax~χun ɕia panʨia.

The dog, its head was still stuck it inside the bottle.

S.FORM: aupa ai.
S.PHON: aupa ai.
S.FORM: aupa ai.
S.PHON: aupa ai.

Because…uhm

S.FORM: ai makas'aang asu tu ka ingadahangcia maza.

S.FORM: ai makas'aang asu tu ka ingadahangcia maza.

The dog believed whether it was still inside.

S.FORM: mazadii ai mazadii.

S.FORM: mazadii ai mazadii.
S.PHON: maðadii ai maðadii.

It's…um, its….

S.FORM: ai maza uvaz hai ka taun a siul malala'la malala'la tu.

The child opened the window and kept calling:

kept calling: "Frog Frog

S.FORM: unghai tu 'uak 'uak ka isabis kasu ai.
S.PHON: uŋx~χai tu ʔuak ʔuak ka isabis kasu ai.
S.FORM: unghai tu 'uak 'uak ka isabis kasu ai.
S.PHON: uŋx~χai tu ʔuak ʔuak ka isabis kasu ai.
S.TRANSL: 你去哪裡了?"
Where did you go"

S.FORM: lala'laun hai.
S.PHON: l~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaun x~χai.
S.FORM: lala'laun hai.
S.PHON: l~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaun x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 一直叫它.
Shouting for it.

S.FORM: naaupa ka isia siul hai.

Because in the window,

Then the dog went down from the window.

S.FORM: mais sia siul muhalhal hai.

S.FORM: mais sia siul muhalhal hai.

Then it went down from the window.

S.FORM: ka pan pulaz adii pan a hai.

S.FORM: ka pan pulaz adii pan a hai.
S.PHON: ka pan pul~ɬað adii pan a x~χai.

Then the bottle broke.

S.FORM: ahhh ng ai duan kudii uvaza ka.

We can see the child goes there.

S.FORM: makuang is'aang tu.

He was really sad.

S.FORM: macinsu saia kunastu hai ka.

S.FORM: macinsu saia kunastu hai ka.
S.PHON: maʨinsu saia kunastu x~χai ka.

He immediately went down.

S.FORM: alibaun a asua.

S.FORM: alibaun a asua.
S.PHON: al~ɬibaun a asua.
S.TRANSL: 抱著那隻狗.
Holding the dog.

S.FORM: at aupa ai ng alibaun asu at kunata amin naia.
S.PHON: at aupa ai ŋ al~ɬibaun asu at kunata amin naia.
S.FORM: at aupa ai ng alibaun asu at kunata amin naia.
S.PHON: at aupa ai ŋ al~ɬibaun asu at kunata amin naia.

And they went outside holding the dog.

S.FORM: malala'la at maldauk tu kikilim.

Searching for that lost frog.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-<完成毛>前進-失去的

S.FORM: hai inata naia malala'la hai mikui.

He kept calling outside, but

S.FORM: ciuru maza ai aupa maza kata aip hai sadu kata tu ai mazadii lukisan hai aiza maza aiza maza tupaun tu ai buhusaz.
S.PHON: ʨiu*u maða ai aupa maða kata aip x~χai sadu kata tu ai maðadii l~ɬukisan x~χai aiða maða aiða maða tupaun tu ai bux~χusað.
S.FORM: ciuru maza ai aupa maza kata aip hai sadu kata tu ai mazadii lukisan hai aiza maza aiza maza tupaun tu ai buhusaz.
S.PHON: ʨiu*u maða ai aupa maða kata aip x~χai sadu kata tu ai maðadii l~ɬukisan x~χai aiða maða aiða maða tupaun tu ai bux~χusað.
S.TRANSL: 還好他,因為我們今天,看得到有沒有在那棵樹裡,有,叫做,虎頭蜂.
Luckily he, because today we see in that tree, there are, how do you call it, hornets.

S.FORM: ung hai mazadii buhusaza mais ta'aza mas itu bunun tu.
S.PHON: uŋ x~χai maðadii bux~χusaða mais taʔaða mas itu bunun tu.
S.FORM: ung hai mazadii buhusaza mais ta'aza mas itu bunun tu.
S.PHON: uŋ x~χai maðadii bux~χusaða mais taʔaða mas itu bunun tu.
S.TRANSL: 如果那些虎頭蜂聽到人的聲音,
